content:
1. Converts float temps between C/F/K (via Celsius) for a weather service; rounds to 2 decimals and rejects only Kelvin results below 0 K.

2. Absolute-zero check applies only to Kelvin output (not inputs or other units); NaN/Inf and negative inputs propagate or produce odd results.

3. Whether to validate NaN/Inf inputs or let them pass through.

4. Inputs below absolute zero; non-finite values; direct Kelvin-to-Kelvin negative values; rounding-induced precision loss on round-trip conversions.
